title: cyphostemma schlechteri
intro: Cyphostemma schlechteri, also known as the 'Milk Bush', is a succulent plant species native to the African savannas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Cyphostemma schlechteri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including a tea or infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
